name: Green
author: Poki
description: Green is a puzzle game where every level is fundamentally different. There are 50 unique and beautifully-crafted puzzles, and you need to think outside the box to solve all of them. Feel free to use the light bulb button that will appear in the top-right corner if you're stuck at a level. Note that there are multiple hints for each level, make sure to read all of them. How quickly can you finish all 50 levels and complete Green? How to play: Use your left mouse button to interact with the puzzle. Click the light bulb for hints. About the creator: Green was created by Bart Bonte. Check out their other game Factory Balls Forever on Poki !
